company.profitability: near break-even with positive cash flow last 2 quarters
notable_signals: 8 years in market; steady mid-market and enterprise customer base
Low churn in last 12 months per customer advisory notes

technical.architecture: Cloud-native microservices; containerized; supports SaaS multi-tenant and VPC-hosted deployments
deployment_options: Private cloud/VPC on AWS or GCP

connectors.kafka: GA (source and sink); tested up to 50K events/sec per partition with horizontal scaling

apis_sdks.rate_limits: Default 2000 req/min per org; adjustable in enterprise plan

mdm_capabilities.entity_resolution: Real-time deterministic + probabilistic matching; tunable thresholds
mdm_capabilities.latency_targets: p95 < 2 minutes end-to-end for streaming mastering

security_compliance.dpa_gdpr: DPA standard available; EU-only data processing and storage option
security_compliance.data_residency: EU regions (Frankfurt/Dublin) with EU-only backups; contractual guarantee
security_compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest; TLS 1.2+ in transit
security_compliance.rbac: Fine-grained, attribute-based access control (ABAC) with audit trails
security_compliance.cmes: Customer-managed keys via AWS KMS / GCP KMS (Enterprise add-on)
security_compliance.testing: Annual external pentest; quarterly internal vuln scans

assumptions_for_our_use_case.deployment: SaaS EU region (no VPC) to meet budget

support.escalation: Defined runbook with L3 engineering on-call for P1

portability.rules_export: Survivorship and quality rules in YAML (open DSL)

lock_in.proprietary_dependencies: Low; transformations run on open DSL; no proprietary runtime required for exports
lock_in.api_limits: Configurable rate limits; no egress penalties
lock_in.termination_assistance: Up to 20 hours included; additional hours at standard rates

public_items: Consent and PII lineage workflows for GDPR (Q3 2026)
roadmap.alignment_notes: Meets AWS/GCP now; Azure support within 12 months. GDPR workflows strengthening in 2026.

company.profitability: Not profitable; Series B funded; 18-24 month runway
notable_signals: Fast growth in SMB segment; mid-market expansion in progress

technical.architecture: SaaS multi-tenant; micro-batch centric with near real-time CDC

apis_sdks.rate_limits: 500 req/min per org; increases require approval

mdm_capabilities.entity_resolution: Batch-first dedup; near real-time via CDC every 5–10 minutes

security_compliance.dpa_gdpr: DPA available; EU region processing supported
security_compliance.data_residency: EU data centers available; backups replicate to US by default unless EU-only backup add-on (planned GA Q3 2026)
security_compliance.encryption: AES-256 at rest; TLS 1.2+ in transit
security_compliance.audit: Table-level audit logs; field-level pending roadmap
security_compliance.testing: External pentest annually; SOC 2 Type II planned 2027

add_ons: EU-only backups add-on pending GA; pricing TBD

overages_fees.exports: $0.02 per 1k rows exported; API rate limit applies

portability.rules_export: Not supported; rules are UI-defined and proprietary

lock_in.proprietary_dependencies: Medium; transformation recipes proprietary and non-exportable
lock_in.api_limits: Strict rate limits on export; egress fees apply
lock_in.termination_assistance: Paid professional services; no included hours

roadmap.alignment_notes: Azure and AWS supported now; GCP not supported. EU-only backups reliant on add-on not yet GA.
